title: Email Integration Fonts (Continued)
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
My team has recently started using Monday.com and we absolutely love it. However, with our Outlook Email integration, the font is not the same and their is no way to change it. Please advise if there is a solut…

posts.author: abaig (Abbas Baig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

My team has recently started using Monday.com and we absolutely love it. However, with our Outlook Email integration, the font is not the same and their is no way to change it. Please advise if there is a solution as we are having to send emails from Outlook.

Thank you,

Abbas Baig

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Abbas,

Just to clarify, are you referring to differences in font when sending natively from Outlook versus when emails are sent within the platform (through the Outlook integration)? Thanks in advance

posts.author: abaig (Abbas Baig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thank you for the swift reply, and yes, I am referring to the difference in font when sending from Outlook (app) and emailing through integration.

Thank you,

Abbas

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for clarifying Abbas!

I will raise this internally, however at this time, I don’t believe we have concrete plans to update the font just yet. That said, if information is shared with me, I will be sure to let you know. Thank you in advance for your understanding!

posts.author: abaig (Abbas Baig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thank you for getting back to me. However, I would like to know when this would be planned considering the discussion below was posted 4 years ago outlining the exact same issue.

Email Integration Fonts Platform discussions
Hi We currently have email integrations on our board that sends out an email from our Outlook account when a pulse status is changed. This works fine but the email that is sent out has a different font than the one we normally use for our emails and therefore doesn’t look like one of our emails. Is there any way we can amend the font? The settings of the emails are as per all normal emails in Outlook and I cannot see anywhere to amend this in Monday.com Any help would be greatly received Tha…

And this one was posted last year.

Email Customization while integrating with Outlook using automations + supporting Arabic/Farsi fonts Feature requests
Dear Team, I hope you are well. while integrating with outlook to automate our workflow, we would like to customize the emails which are sent to our clients and change the fonts, sizes , etc. However, this feature is not currently available. It would be awesome if we could customize the automate emails so our clients would have a better view while receiving our messages. Thank you for your assistance in advance.

I hope this is not too direct but I am curious if this implementation will ever be incorporated. Thank you in advance for the assistance!

Kind regards,

Abbas Baig

posts.author: Viv-maas (Vivianne)
posts.cookedHtml: I strongly encourage this request! Are there anymore updates regarding this feature request?

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Another option is use of a monday.com native add-on named SuperMail, in which you can design and select any font you want.

monday.com

SuperMail - monday.com Marketplace

Emails: Design, Send and Track directly from monday.com
